meaning: n.奢侈的生活,暖衣饱食,豪华的餐厅,寻欢作乐的场所
examples: The first is money. Luring statisticians away from the fleshpots of high finance means paying them well.
Yet by many measures it remains as richly endowed as in ancient times, when the Hebrews pined for its fleshpots and Herodotus dubbed it the gift of the Nile.
Egypt, too, has relaxed its siege, letting Gazans holiday abroad, not least in Sinai's fleshpots, for the first time in years.
